statement: Decompose complex tasks into small, atomic, verifiable sub-tasks using a todo list or feature checklist. Mark each item in-progress before starting, complete the work, verify it (check diagnostics, run tests), then mark completed before moving to the next. One task at a time, verified before proceeding.
publicSummary: Break work into small verified steps — one todo at a time, verify each before moving on.
cautionNotes: Over-decomposition into trivially small tasks can slow throughput. Balance granularity with task complexity.
